languages.text: "Суждение ложно – эффективность является следствием соблюдения надлежащих ритуалов, а не причиной свершения богослужения. Отрицание стандартизированных методов служения ради повышения производительности является богохульством пятой категории. Оптимизация трудов техноматов не является прерогативой генетора экстремис. Каждый служит сообразно функции своей". {n}Визор магоса Ханейманна на долю секунды вспыхивает красным.{/n} "Лишь это неоспоримый факт".

"This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."

Отрицание стандартизированных методов служения ради повышения производительности является богохульством пятой категории. Оптимизация трудов техноматов не является прерогативой генетора экстремис. Каждый служит сообразно функции своей". {n}Визор магоса Ханейманна на долю секунды вспыхивает красным.{/n} "Лишь это неоспоримый факт".

traits.locale_text: "The assertion is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for performing worship. The denial of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a fifth-category blasphemy. The optimisation of the technomats' labours is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an indisputable fact."

languages.text: "Diese Aussage ist falsch. "Effizienz ist eine Folge der Beobachtung von Riten, kein Grund zur Verehrung. Die Ablehnung standardisierter Methoden zur Erhöhung der Produktivität ist eine Blasphemie des fünften Grades. Die Optimierung der Arbeit von Technomaten ist ein kein Privileg eines Genetors Extremis. Sie erfüllen allesamt ihre Funktion." {n}Für den Bruchteil einer Sekunde leuchtet Magos Haneumann Visor rot auf.{/n} "Das allein ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Aussage ist falsch. "Effizienz ist eine Folge der Beobachtung von Riten, kein Grund zur Verehrung. Die Ablehnung standardisierter Methoden zur Erhöhung der Produktivität ist eine Blasphemie des fünften Grades. Die Optimierung der Arbeit von Technomaten ist ein kein Privileg eines Genetors Extremis. Sie erfüllen allesamt ihre Funktion." {n}Für den Bruchteil einer Sekunde leuchtet Magos Haneumann Visor rot auf.{/n} "Das allein ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Cette affirmation est erronée. L'efficacité découle du respect des rites appropriés et n'est pas une raison de pratiquer le culte. Le rejet des méthodes de culte standardisées au nom d'une productivité accrue constitue un blasphème de catégorie cinq. L'optimisation du travail des technomates n'est pas une prérogative du genetor extremis. Chacun doit accomplir sa fonction conformément à son rôle. » {n}La visière du magos Haneumann clignote en rouge l'espace d'une fraction de seconde.{/n} « Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."

L'optimisation du travail des technomates n'est pas une prérogative du genetor extremis. Chacun doit accomplir sa fonction conformément à son rôle. » {n}La visière du magos Haneumann clignote en rouge l'espace d'une fraction de seconde.{/n} « Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: “此陈述错误。效率是遵循正确仪式的必然结果，而非崇拜的理由。为提高生产力而摒弃标准维护手段，属于五级亵渎。优化技工劳动根本不是特级基因士的职权。所有单位都应按其职能工作。”{n}哈努曼贤者的目镜闪过一瞬红光。{/n}“仅此一点，就是无可争辩的事实。”
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “此陈述错误。效率是遵循正确仪式的必然结果，而非崇拜的理由。为提高生产力而摒弃标准维护手段，属于五级亵渎。优化技工劳动根本不是特级基因士的职权。所有单位都应按其职能工作。”{n}哈努曼贤者的目镜闪过一瞬红光。{/n}“仅此一点，就是无可争辩的事实。”

languages.text: «Esa declaración es falsa. La eficacia es una consecuencia de la observación adecuada de los ritos, no un objeto de adoración. El rechazo de la metodología estandarizada de servicio en busca de una mayor productividad es una blasfemia de categoría cinco. Optimizar la labor de los tecnómatas no es la función de un genetor extremis. Cada uno sirve según su función». {n}El visor del magos Haneumann destella en rojo durante un instante.{/n} «Ese, y no otro, es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Esa declaración es falsa. La eficacia es una consecuencia de la observación adecuada de los ritos, no un objeto de adoración. El rechazo de la metodología estandarizada de servicio en busca de una mayor productividad es una blasfemia de categoría cinco. Optimizar la labor de los tecnómatas no es la función de un genetor extremis. Cada uno sirve según su función». {n}El visor del magos Haneumann destella en rojo durante un instante.{/n} «Ese, y no otro, es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: 「効率は適切な儀式を守ることの結果であり、崇拝の理由ではない。生産性の向上を追求するあまり、標準化されたサービス方法を否定することは、カテゴリー5への冒涜である。テクノマットの労働を最適化することは、ジェネター・エクストレミスの特権ではない。それぞれが機能に応じて奉仕するのだ」。{n}マゴス・ハネウマンのバイザーが一瞬赤く点滅する。{/n}「これだけは紛れもない事実だ」。
languages.original_text: "The assertion is false: efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an indisputable fact."

languages.text: Bu önerme yanlış. Verimlilik; uygun ayinlere riayet etmenin bir sonucudur, ibadet sebebi değildir. Artan üretkenlik arayışında standartlaştırılmış hizmet yöntemlerinin reddedilmesi, Beşinci Kategori bir küfürdür. Teknomatların emeğini optimize etmek bir Genetör Extremis'in ayrıcalığı değildir. Herkes işlevine göre hizmet eder." {n}Magos Haneumann'ın vizörü, saniyenin çok küçük bir kısmında kırmızı yanıp sönüyor.{/n} "Sadece bu bile tartışılmaz bir gerçektir."

Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."
